Maharashtra Mandal Krakow महाराष्ट्र मंडळ क्राकोव

Celebrating and preserving the rich Marathi culture, traditions, and heritage in the heart of Poland. Join us in our cultural journey.

Upcoming Events Learn More

About Us

We are a vibrant community of Marathi-speaking people in Krakow, dedicated to preserving our cultural roots while embracing our new home.

Cultural Preservation

Celebrating Maharashtra's rich heritage through traditional festivals like Ganeshotsav, Diwali, Gudi Padwa, and more.

Community Building

Creating a warm and welcoming space for Marathi families and individuals to connect, share, and grow together.

Cultural Exchange

Bridging the gap between Indian and Polish cultures through interactive events and collaborations.

Regular Events

Organizing monthly cultural gatherings, food festivals, dance workshops, and celebration of Indian festivals.

Upcoming Events

Mark your calendars for our upcoming cultural celebrations and gatherings.

March 2026

Gudi Padwa Celebration

Welcome the new year with traditional Gudi Padwa festivities, including rangoli, traditional food, and cultural performances.

Radha Govind Bhakti Yog Temple, Krakow
April 2026

Maharashtra Day Food Festival

Celebrate Maharashtra Day with an authentic food festival featuring traditional Marathi dishes, music, and dance.

Krakow, Poland
August-September 2026

Ganeshotsav 2026

Our biggest celebration of the year! 10 days of Ganpati Bappa's grandeur with visarjan, cultural programs, and community gatherings.

Radha Govind Bhakti Yog Temple, Krakow
October-November 2026

Diwali Celebration

The festival of lights celebration with diya decorating, fireworks, rangoli competitions, and delicious festive food.

Krakow, Poland
View All Events

Latest Updates

Stay informed about our latest events, celebrations, and community news.

March 2025

Gudi Padwa 2025 - New Year Celebrations

Welcoming the Marathi new year with traditional Gudi Padwa celebrations featuring authentic Marathi cuisine and cultural performances.

November 2024

Diwali - Festival of Lights 2024

Celebrating the festival of lights with diya decorations, rangoli competitions, and a wonderful evening of music and dance.

Read More
September 2024

Ganeshotsav 2024 Celebrations in Krakow

A grand celebration of Ganeshotsav 2024 at Radha Govind Bhakti Yog Temple with 10 days of devotion, cultural programs, and community togetherness.
